description.s: Ultra-compact pill-shaped card for use in lists. Shows only the item name with ellipsis truncation. Click opens item via
(supports Ctrl/Cmd+Click for new tab, Alt+Click for root).
Designed as the default child view for sortable-list-view, where vertical density matters more than preview content.

m.s: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; background: var(--color-bg-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;
overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--color-text);
